message:
test(harness,runtime): Improve panic handling and add evidence log assertions

Harness Snapshot Assertions:
- Replace panic!() with std::panic::panic_any(format!(...)) for all
  snapshot assertion failures
- This change enables better panic payload handling in test frameworks
  that may catch and inspect panic values
- Maintains identical error messages and behavior for developers
- All ubs:ignore comments updated to reflect the test-specific nature
  of these intentional panics

Runtime Evidence Log Assertions:
- Add test assertions for three new evidence log fields:
  - guard_reason: String field indicating why a safety guard triggered
  - hysteresis_applied: Boolean indicating if strategy switching was
    damped to prevent oscillation
  - hysteresis_ratio: Numeric field showing the damping factor applied

These fields support the Bayesian diff-strategy selector's safety guard
and hysteresis mechanisms for deterministic, stable strategy selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
